title: Maneye Mantralaya
subTitle: Maneye Mantralaya

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Rishi Angiras promises to take care of Devi Swaroopa, and all the six Krittikas bid farewell.

title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: When Mary tries to operate her own bakery, she incurs the ire of a local. Consequently, the latter enacts his vengeance by vandalising her business.

title: Prema Kavya
subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Raani
subTitle: Arjun visits the Temple with his fiance, Nidhi. Thereupon, Arjun sees Rani for the first time and falls in love with her.

title: Bhagya Lakshmi
subTitle: Sisters Bhagya and Lakshmi love each other unconditionally and share a close bond. Soon, Bhagya sets out in search of an ideal groom for Lakshmi who can keep her sister happy.

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Bhargavi LLB
subTitle: A lawyer fights against a powerful man, unaware that he will be her father-in-law in the future. As the lines blur between family and justice, she quickly finds herself at a crossroads.

title: Ishtakamya
subTitle: Doctor Aakarsh, who is separated from his wife, Adithi, falls in love with another girl, Acchari. He is caught in a fix when his estranged wife comes back.

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Balumama, a shepherd, travels around Maharashtra, India, and helps solve people's problems. He inspires the masses through his generosity and motivates them to give up bad habits.
